decision.summary: Keep the weekly 74k reach position unchanged and do not open a new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The live weekly `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-april-6-12` Yes position is only at 49.5%, so it does not qualify for take-profit, and early-stage rules keep it open. The latest 2026-04-10 Beecthor transcript still allows a short-term push toward 73.3k-74.1k before looking for shorts, and Binance at 72886.28 keeps that thesis alive but not aggressively extending after a 73434.0 high. For new entries, nearest-strike-first points to the April 10 74k daily market, but at just 4.7% it is already too discounted and offers no clean edge this late in the session; the next weekly upside strike is already the open 74k position.
